name: Endymion, the Magistus of Mastery
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖魔の大賢者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マギストス・マスター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エンディミオン
name_jp_tl_base: Endymion, the Great Sage of Sacred Magic
desc: You can target 1 "Magistus" monster you control; equip it with 1 "Magistus" monster from your Extra Deck. You can target 1 face-up Spell you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 1 card, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Endymion, the Magistus of Mastery" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 "Magistus" monster you control; equip it with 1 "Magistus" monster from your Extra Deck. You can target 1 face-up Spell you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 1 card, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Endymion, the Magistus of Mastery" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 "Magistus" monster you control; equip it with 1 "Magistus" monster from your Extra Deck. You can target 1 face-up Spell you control; destroy it, and if you do, draw 1 card, then place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Endymion, the Magistus of Mastery" once per turn.

action: Equips from the player's Extra Deck
Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
